name: scope-mcp
description: SCOPE — Security, Compliance & Operational Policy Evaluation. Pre-flight evaluation for agentic workflows. Maps MCP tools and API actions to risk level, business impact, and regulatory exposure across 26 regimes (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI, SOX, SOC2, EU AI Act, ISO 42001, and more).

interface.shortDescription: Pre-flight compliance evaluation for agentic workflows.
interface.longDescription: SCOPE is a Codex plugin that runs deterministic pre-flight compliance evaluation on agentic workflows you're building. Tell SCOPE which MCP tools, connectors, or API actions your agent will be permitted to invoke and it produces a deterministic report — risk level per action, business impact, regulatory exposure across 26 regimes (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI, SOX, SOC2, EU AI Act, NY DFS 500, ISO 42001, and more), segregation-of-duties red flags, and a go/no-go recommendation.
